name: Project status changed (Active → On Hold / Completed)

parameters.subject: =Project {{$json.project_title}} status updated to {{ $json.project_status }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  pm.id               AS project_id,
  pm.title            AS project_title,
  pm.start_date,
  pm.end_date,
  pm.status           AS project_status,
  pm.updated_at       AS project_updated_at,

  -- project manager (owner)
  owner.email         AS project_manager_email,

  -- team member
  tm.id               AS team_user_id,
  tm.firstname       AS team_user_first_name,
  tm.lastname        AS team_user_last_name,
  tm.email            AS team_user_email

FROM project_managements pm

-- project manager
JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = pm.owner_id

-- project team members
JOIN project_team_members ptm
  ON ptm.project_team_id = pm.project_team_id

JOIN spree_users tm
  ON tm.id = ptm.user_id

WHERE
  pm.updated_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 500 MINUTE     -- updated within last 1 hour
  AND pm.updated_at > pm.created_at               -- exclude newly created projects
             -- avoid duplicate emails

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
WITH latest_status AS (
  SELECT
    psl.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY psl.project_management_id
      ORDER BY psl.created_at DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM project_status_logs psl
  WHERE psl.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
)

SELECT
  ls.id                     AS status_log_id,
  ls.status                 AS new_project_status,
  ls.created_at             AS status_changed_at,

  pm.id                     AS project_id,
  pm.title                  AS project_title,

  -- project manager
  pm_owner.email            AS project_manager_email,

  -- team member
  tm.id                     AS team_user_id,
  tm.firstname              AS team_user_first_name,
  tm.lastname               AS team_user_last_name,
  tm.email                  AS team_user_email

FROM latest_status ls

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = ls.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users pm_owner
  ON pm_owner.id = pm.owner_id

JOIN project_team_members ptm
  ON ptm.project_team_id = pm.project_team_id

JOIN spree_users tm
  ON tm.id = ptm.user_id

WHERE
  ls.rn = 1   -- ✅ ONLY LATEST STATUS PER PROJECT
  AND ls.status IN ('on_hold', 'completed', 'in_progress', 'active', 'overdue');

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
